data.name: 我與魔王的親密愛戀
data.detailed_description:
◆故事


在還算富裕的家庭中成長，有著愛著自己的家人，原以為一切都會像現在一樣順利，
但是那場意外...

「好痛苦，好絕望，無法呼吸，感覺心臟要爆炸了，什麼都不想聽..」.

「什麼都...不重要了。」

一場意外帶走了我的家人，我的生活，我的一切，留下的只剩這個再也看不清世界的眼睛，我是被世界拋棄之人，我沒有存在的價值。

不過我遇見了妳，拯救了我的妳，妳是我唯一的一道光，拉著我的手前進。

就這樣，我與異世界的魔王共同生活，在生活中互相了解，一起展開了我這輩子都沒想過的歷險。
但是，越是深入了解，越是覺得妳比我想像的更加痛苦，原來，妳也是被拋棄的人。
背負著國家的重擔、被人民的不信任、勇者的追捕，妳所承受的一切都不是一個人該承受的。

芙蘭，這一次，就換我來拯救妳。

◆玩法


在有限的時間內，幫助芙蘭修復好穿越回原本世界的異界門，並在修復的過程中了解芙蘭。

玩家可通過『說話』、『互動』、『送禮』、『約會』來更了解芙蘭，其中還會有其他角色的登場，與其他角色也能夠進行特定的交流互動；更有場景上的物件能夠進行調查，調查的結果可能會讓你在與芙蘭的互動上更為輕鬆。

隨著時間的推進，穿越門後，又會有不一樣的角色、場景提供探索調查。更能夠逐漸了解芙蘭的辛酸，在內憂與外患的雙重包夾下，構成的不僅是戀愛的劇情。
每一句的對話、每一個事件，都會讓玩家更加了解眼前這個看似堅強，卻也是需要人扶持的女人。

◆遊戲特色


◇23張基本CG，包含差分200張以上
◇遊戲文字12萬字
◇一位主要女角，兩位次要女角
◇純愛劇情，體驗兩個不同的世界
◇遊戲結局：6種

data.short_description: 突如其來的意外，帶走了原本屬於我的美好生活，被世界所拋棄的我，找不到生存的意義，直到遇見了妳……。我與魔王的生活在這種荒謬的時機下開始，彼此互相支撐、互相幫助，最後一起走上一條特別的路。
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 英文, 德文, 俄文, 日文*, 泰文, 簡體中文, 越南文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: My intimate love with the devil king
data.detailed_description:
◆Story


Growing up in quite a wealthy, lovely family, I thought that everything would be alright, as it is now.
But then the accident happened…

"It was so painful, so hopeless. I couldn't breathe; my heart felt like it was going to explode. I didn't want to hear anything..."

"Nothing matters anymore."

An accident took away my family, my life, my everything. All that remained were the eyes that could no longer see a clear view of the world. I was abandoned by the world; I have no value of existence.

But I met you, the one who saved me. You are my only light, pulling my hand to go forward.

Thus, I live together with the devil King of the other world, getting to know each other in life and having an adventure together that I'd never thought of in my life.

But the more I try to understand you, the more I feel that you are suffering more than I thought.
You are also an abandoned person.
The burden of the country, the distrust of the people, and the hunting of the heroes… All that you have endured is not for one person to bear.

Flan, This time, it's my turn to save you.

◆Gameplay


In a limited time, help Flan to repair the Otherworld Gate and return to the original world. In the process of repairing the door, come to understand Flan.

Players can get to know Flan better by "talking," "interacting," "giving gifts," and "dating," in which other characters will appear. You will be able to interact with other characters in specific ways. There are also objects in the scenes that can be investigated, and the results of the investigation may make your interactions with Flan easier.

As time progresses, , there will be different characters and scenes to explore and investigate. You are also able to gradually understand the sorrows of Flan, under the double wrapping of internal and external problems which constitute more than just the plot of love.

Each conversation and each event will let the player understand more about the woman who seems strong, but also needs the help in front of them.

◆Game Features


◇23 basic CGs, including more than 200 differentials
◇120,000 words of game text
◇One main female character and two secondary female characters
◇Pure love plot, experiencing two different worlds
◇Game ending: 6 kinds

data.short_description: The sudden accident took away the good life that originally belonged to me. Abandoned by the world, I could not find the meaning of survival until I met you… In this absurd time, I started my life with the devil King, supporting each other, helping each other, and finally taking a special path together.
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, German, Russian, Japanese*, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Vietnamese, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
